title: Polyline
description: Polyline: A curve consisting of a continuous chain of straight line segments. The Polyline is considered closed if the first and last ControlPoints are coincident.

ControlPoints.description: An ordered set of three-dimensional points defining the curve shape.

_t.description: Optional Type descriminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
